ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* The format of the dataset */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* The spatial resolution of the dataset */,
  "temporal_resolution" TEXT /* The temporal resolution of the dataset */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* The geographical area covered by the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the dataset belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wavelengths" (
  "wavelength_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wavelength */,
  "wavelength_value" REAL /* Value of the wavelength in nanometers */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the wavelength */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the wavelength and its significance */,
  "range_min" REAL /* The minimum value of the wavelength range */,
  "range_max" REAL /* The maximum value of the wavelength range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wavelength_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the measurement belongs to */,
  "wavelength_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wavelength for the measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value at the specific wavelength */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The exact time when the measurement was taken */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the measurement location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* The altitude of the measurement location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_wavelength_id FOREIGN KEY ("wavelength_id") REFERENCES wavelengths ("wavelength_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* The type of sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* The model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* The date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* The current operational status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* The session ID of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which the quality metric applies */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Quality metric description (e.g., accuracy, completeness) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* The numerical value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* The date when the quality metric was recorded */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* The name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the project */,
  "leader_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_leader_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
